qz-tray.js

QZ Tray Connector
Version:
  • 2.2.6-SNAPSHOT
License:
  • LGPL-2.1-only

    Connects a web client to the QZ Tray software. Enables printing and device communication from javascript.

Source:
  • qz-tray.js, line 3
